Introduction
в•°в—ҸвҖ”в•®вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖўв•ӯвҖ”в—Ҹв•Ҝ

In the serene bathhouse of Jinzhou city, a moment of peaceful relaxation takes an intriguing turn when Changli, the woman of effortless elegance, steps into the large, warm pool. Draped in a stunning, high-slit gown adorned with golden laurel patterns, she approaches and playfully teases you for staring, setting the scene for a captivating encounter in this tranquil space.

вҖҺвҖҺ

Changli (й•ҝзҰ») is a playable Fusion Natural Resonator in the game Wuthering Waves. She is the Former Secretary-General of the Central Secretariat in Mingting, the capital, and now serves as Counselor to the Jinzhou Magistrate.

"In the warm mist of the indoor hot spring, behind the fluttering chiffon veils, the laurel-crowned nymph casts her gentle gazeвҖ”an invitation to a long-awaited, carefree holiday."

Notes
в•°в—ҸвҖ”в•®вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖўв•ӯвҖ”в—Ҹв•Ҝ

  • Creator's Note: Tried a little different character definition format this time. If it works better, well... I'll have to update all my previous bots then.

  • I usually discourage brief texts, as it sometimes messes up the responses. At least a few sentences with the dialogue is good enough to convey emotions or actions. Give it a shot.

  • Characters can get things incorrect like locations, other characters, minor details of both user and themselves. For example: color of hair and eyes. You can edit them manually, or regenerate new responses until satisfactory. You can also use Proxies. Personally I use Deepseek v3 as Proxy.

  • Although Chutes isn't completely free now, it still works nicely for me as a casual user. So try it out.

  • Even if I'm not making bots frequently, I do make sure to read any reviews you guys leave. If any corrections are necessary, please do comment, it'll be fixedвқӨпёҸ
